name: VTIL_GetDwordValue, VTIL_GetDoubleValue, VTIL_GetStringValue
title: VTIL_GetDwordValue, VTIL_GetDoubleValue, VTIL_GetStringValue
syntax: long VTIL_GetDwordValue(dbNode workingSetMaster, dword objectId, dword & value); // form 1
description: Returns the value of an object or of an object attribute.

You can use VTIL_GetDoubleValue or VTIL_GetDwordValue without attribute ID to get the numeric value of a Key object, Button object or an object that supports the Change Numeric Value command. You can use VTIL_GetStringValue the get the string value of a Input String, Output String, String Variable or a Input Attribute object.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function
